end return(function(O,N,m,g,K,A,e,v,u,j,F,x,t,C,J,a,R,G,V,z,q,Q)a,t,V,C,J,u,R,Q,z,x,F,j,q,v,G=function(O,k)local N=t(k)local m=function(m,g,K,A,e)return Q(O,{m,g;K;A;e},k,N)end return m
